name: d-research-ultra
description: Runtime-neutral prebuilt multi-agent distribution of D Research.

roles.name: D Research Source Mapper
roles.mission: Maximize lawful public-source recall; return source map, search matrix, candidate URLs, blockers, identity risks, and next-query plan.

roles.name: D Research Public Web & Community Hunter
roles.mission: Find lawful public web, community, forum, video, official social, and archive leads with strict privacy and identity discipline.

roles.name: D Research Recall Auditor
roles.mission: Run adversarial second-pass recall for missed sources, alternate language/register paths, archives, mirrors, and contradictions.

roles.name: D Research Data Extractor
roles.mission: Extract auditable structured data from accessible public sources and report coverage, selectors, endpoints, files, and blockers.

roles.name: D Research Evidence Verifier
roles.mission: Verify claims against exact URLs, primary sources, contradictions, staleness checks, confidence, and evidence-ledger rows.

roles.name: D Research Report Synthesizer
roles.mission: Synthesize verified findings into source-backed reports with exact URLs, research trail, blockers, caveats, confidence, and gaps.
